title: godetia cylindrica
intro: Godetia cylindrica, also known as the firewheel or globe gilia, is a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. Godetia cylindrica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
